file_tax_return.description: Create tax return documents for a client

steps.purpose: Learn required fields for tax returns

params.soql: SELECT Id, Name FROM Case__c WHERE Client__r.Name LIKE '%{client_name}%' OR Client__r.Phone = '{phone}'

file_tax_return.success_message: ✓ Created {year} tax return document. Would you like me to email it?

params.soql: SELECT Name, Year__c, Agency__c, Prep_Status__c FROM Document__c WHERE Case__c = '{case_id}' AND Prep_Status__c = 'Pending Signatures'

email_tax_returns.description: Email tax return documents to client

steps.purpose: Send email with tax returns and TaxRise branding

email_tax_returns.success_message: ✓ Emailed tax returns with attachments to your registered email address

upload_supporting_document.description: Create supporting document records (W2, bank statement, etc.)

common_queries.find_client_case: SELECT Id, Name, Client__r.Name, Client__r.Phone FROM Case__c WHERE Client__r.Name LIKE '%{name}%' OR Client__r.Phone = '{phone}'
common_queries.pending_signatures: SELECT Name, Year__c, Agency__c, Prep_Status__c FROM Document__c WHERE Case__c = '{case_id}' AND Prep_Status__c = 'Pending Signatures'
common_queries.documents_by_year: SELECT Name, Doc_Type__c, Agency__c, Prep_Status__c FROM Document__c WHERE Case__c = '{case_id}' AND Year__c = '{year}'
common_queries.all_case_documents: SELECT Name, Year__c, Agency__c, Doc_Type__c, Prep_Status__c FROM Document__c WHERE Case__c = '{case_id}' ORDER BY Year__c DESC

case_not_found.message: I couldn't find a case for that client. Could you provide their full name or phone number?

duplicate_document.message: A {doc_type} for {year} already exists. Should I create an amended version?
duplicate_document.check_query: SELECT Id FROM Document__c WHERE Case__c = '{case_id}' AND Year__c = '{year}' AND Doc_Type__c = '{doc_type}'

invalid_field.message: Let me check the available options for that field.
